description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular structure with a prominent display area at the front, divided into four open compartments for brochures or small items. The kiosk is supported by a single central pole mounted on a sturdy black base, which provides stability. Behind the display, a tall, flat blue panel serves as a backdrop, adorned with subtle cross-shaped accents and a central logo. The materials appear to be primarily metal or plastic for the kiosk body and pole, with a composite or laminate panel for the backdrop. The overall design is sleek and functional, with clean lines and a modern aesthetic. The kiosk is compact, making it suitable for placement on sidewalks, in parks, or within commercial environments.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a four-compartment display, central support pole, and a tall blue backdrop featuring a logo and subtle accents. The design is sleek, functional, and compact.
description_view_0: Front view shows the four open compartments, central logo, and blue backdrop with cross-shaped accents.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the compartments and the thinness of the backdrop panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, flat surface of the backdrop with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the kiosk's slim profile and support structure.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign with logo, centrally placed on the front display panel
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, integrated with the top of the display structure, no overhangs or decorative elements
